items.title: Amazon buys ads in ChatGPT to promote Prime Day
items.summary: Amazon is turning to ChatGPT to promote Prime Day, using the AI chatbot as a new advertising channel. Prime Day 2026 expected to feature huge beauty deals.

items.title: How AI and Substack are changing affiliate marketing for beauty brands
items.summary: AI tools and creator newsletters are reshaping how DTC beauty brands run affiliate programs. Beauty brands report lower CAC via Substack affiliate partnerships.

items.title: Victoria's Secret is betting on creators to fuel its biggest fashion show yet
items.summary: Victoria's Secret integrates creator commerce, opening fashion show access to social media creators to amplify brand reach among Gen Z.

items.title: Nutrafol CEO Cindy Gustafson is reaching men, growing retention with tech
items.summary: Nutrafol CEO reports double-digit growth in 18 months, targeting men's hair wellness market, using tech-driven retention and subscription model. Hair wellness is a high-growth subcategory in NA beauty.

items.title: Clinique expands the Black Honey franchise to nail polish
items.summary: Estée Lauder's Clinique is building a 'Black Honey world' by expanding its bestselling Black Honey lip product franchise into nail polish. The Black Honey Almost Lipstick is a perennial Sephora bestseller.

items.title: Amazon Prime Day 2026: Beauty brands prepare major deals strategy
items.summary: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is approaching, with beauty being one of the top-selling categories. CeraVe, The Ordinary, Sol de Janeiro, and ELF consistently rank in Amazon Beauty Top 10. Beauty DTC brands investing heavily in Prime Day deals.

items.title: TikTok Shop beauty virality: ELF, Sol de Janeiro, Bondi Sands dominating social commerce
items.summary: TikTok Shop continues to drive beauty product virality in NA. ELF Cosmetics Camo CC Cream, Sol de Janeiro Brazilian Bum Bum Cream, and Bondi Sands SPF products are top performers. 'TikTok made me buy it' beauty category growing YoY.

items.title: Skincare SPF and sun care trending in North America summer 2026
items.summary: SPF face products, mineral sunscreen, and hybrid SPF-skincare are top-growing North American beauty subcategory entering summer. Products like EltaMD UV Clear, Supergoop Unseen Sunscreen, and La Roche-Posay Anthelios are seeing surging demand.

items.title: The Ordinary and affordable skincare brands dominate Amazon North America beauty charts
items.summary: Affordable clinical skincare continues to outperform prestige in volume. The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%, CeraVe Moisturizing Cream, and Neutrogena Hydro Boost are perennial Amazon beauty top 10. Value-for-money positioning key for NA market.
